pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Multi-AZ subnet layout with redundant NAT gateways. Route tables ensure traffic flows through proper network paths.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Network ACLs and security groups provide defense in depth. Private subnets isolate sensitive workloads from public internet.

pillars.title: Performance
pillars.description: VPC endpoints reduce data transfer costs and latency for AWS service calls. Proper CIDR planning prevents IP exhaustion.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Shared VPC infrastructure reduces per-service networking costs. NAT gateway usage monitored to optimize data transfer.
